text_blocks.text: The library system also includes branch libraries for
Architecture, Chemistry & Physics, Engineering, Law, and
Mathematics as well as information centers in the Mendoza
College of Business, the Kellogg Institute for International
Studies, the Joan B. Kroc Institute for International
Peace Studies, and a slide library in O'Shaughnessy Hall. A
theology library was also opened in fall of 2015. Located
on the first floor of Stanford Hall, it is the first branch of
the library system to be housed in a dorm room. The library
system holds over three million volumes, was the single largest
university library in the world upon its completion, and
remains one of the 100 largest libraries in the country.
